name: Mesaieed Petrochemical Holding Company Q.P.S.C.
summary: Mesaieed Petrochemical Holding Company Q.P.S.C., through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells petrochemical products in Qatar, the Middle East, Asia, Africa, Indian sub-continent, and Europe. The company operates through two segments, Petrochemicals and Chlor-Alkali. It is involved in the production and sale of ethylene, polyolefins, 1-hexene, C4+, polyethylene, normal alpha olefins, pyrolysis gasoline, C3 and C4, caustic soda, ethylene dichloride, vinyl chloride monomer, and hydrochloric acid. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquarterd in Doha, Qatar. Mesaieed Petrochemical Holding Company Q.P.S.C. is a subsidiary of Qatar Petroleum.
